---
title: "07c — DiD Estimation: Antisemitism Outcome (All Methods)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas")
source("C:/Users/ammonsj/Ideas/_config.R")
```

```{r libraries}
library(arrow)
library(data.table)
library(fect)

# Load modern DiD wrapper
source(file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "R", "did_wrapper.R"))
```

## fect models (IFE, MC, FE)

```{r fect-estimate}
library(parallel)

fect_methods <- c("ife", "mc", "fe")
total_cores <- parallel::detectCores()

# --- Strategy: parallelize across figures ---
# Each figure gets: 3 fect models + 1 placebo + 1 lexicon = 5 models
# fect's internal bootstrap uses multiple cores
# Balance: N_WORKERS figures in parallel, each getting CORES_PER cores for bootstrap
#
# With ~16 cores:  3 figure-workers × 4 bootstrap-cores = 12 cores utilized
# With ~8 cores:   2 figure-workers × 3 bootstrap-cores = 6 cores utilized

# Determine which figures still need work
todo_figs <- names(FIGURES)[sapply(names(FIGURES), function(fk) {
  panel_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_antisem_", fk, ".parquet"))
  if (!file.exists(panel_path)) return(FALSE)  # no panel = skip
  # Check if ALL 5 models exist for this figure
  paths <- c(
    file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_ife_antisem_", fk, ".rds")),
    file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_mc_antisem_", fk, ".rds")),
    file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_fe_antisem_", fk, ".rds")),
    file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_placebo_antisem_", fk, ".rds")),
    file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_ife_lexicon_antisem_", fk, ".rds"))
  )
  !all(file.exists(paths))
})]

n_todo <- length(todo_figs)
message("Figures needing fect models: ", n_todo, " of ", length(FIGURES))

if (n_todo == 0) {
  message("All fect models already exist.")
} else {
  # Set parallelism levels
  N_WORKERS <- min(n_todo, max(1, floor(total_cores / 4)))
  CORES_PER <- max(2, floor((total_cores - 1) / N_WORKERS))
  message("Strategy: ", N_WORKERS, " figure-workers × ", CORES_PER,
          " bootstrap-cores = ", N_WORKERS * CORES_PER, " cores (",
          total_cores, " available)")

  # Progress directory
  prog_dir_fect <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, ".progress_fect")
  dir.create(prog_dir_fect, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Worker function: fit all fect models for one figure
  fit_all_fect <- function(fig_key, figures_list, models_dir, panels_dir,
                           cores_per, seed_val) {
    library(arrow)
    library(data.table)
    library(fect)

    prog_file <- file.path(models_dir, ".progress_fect", paste0(fig_key, ".txt"))
    writeLines(paste0("STARTED ", Sys.time()), prog_file)

    fig <- figures_list[[fig_key]]
    panel_path <- file.path(panels_dir, paste0("did_panel_antisem_", fig_key, ".parquet"))
    panel <- as.data.table(read_parquet(panel_path))

    n_treated <- uniqueN(panel[!is.na(treat_date), newspaper_id])
    if (n_treated < 3) {
      writeLines(paste0("SKIPPED <3 treated"), prog_file)
      return(paste0(fig_key, ": SKIPPED (<3 treated)"))
    }

    results <- character(0)

    # --- 3 fect methods ---
    for (method in c("ife", "mc", "fe")) {
      model_path <- file.path(models_dir,
                              paste0("fect_", method, "_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
      if (file.exists(model_path)) {
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": exists"))
        next
      }

      writeLines(paste0("FITTING ", method, " ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
      out <- tryCatch({
        fect(
          antisem_rate_roberta ~ treated,
          data = as.data.frame(panel),
          index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
          method = method,
          force = "two-way",
          se = TRUE,
          vartype = "bootstrap",
          nboots = 200,
          parallel = TRUE,
          cores = cores_per,
          seed = seed_val
        )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)

      if (!is.null(out)) {
        saveRDS(out, model_path)
        boot_se <- if (!is.null(out$att.avg.boot) && length(out$att.avg.boot) > 1) {
          sd(out$att.avg.boot)
        } else NA_real_
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": ATT=", round(out$att.avg, 4),
                                     " SE=", round(boot_se, 4)))
        writeLines(paste0("DONE ", method, " ATT=", round(out$att.avg, 4), " ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
      } else {
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": FAILED"))
        writeLines(paste0("FAILED ", method, " ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
      }
      rm(out); gc()
    }

    # --- Placebo test (IFE) ---
    writeLines(paste0("FITTING placebo ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
    placebo_path <- file.path(models_dir,
                              paste0("fect_placebo_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (!file.exists(placebo_path)) {
      out_p <- tryCatch({
        fect(
          antisem_rate_roberta ~ treated,
          data = as.data.frame(panel),
          index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
          method = "ife",
          force = "two-way",
          se = TRUE, vartype = "bootstrap", nboots = 200,
          parallel = TRUE, cores = cores_per, seed = seed_val,
          placeboTest = TRUE, placebo.period = c(-6, -1)
        )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(out_p)) {
        saveRDS(out_p, placebo_path)
        results <- c(results, "  placebo: saved")
      } else {
        results <- c(results, "  placebo: FAILED")
      }
      rm(out_p); gc()
    } else {
      results <- c(results, "  placebo: exists")
    }

    # --- Robustness: lexicon outcome (IFE) ---
    writeLines(paste0("FITTING lexicon ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
    lex_path <- file.path(models_dir,
                          paste0("fect_ife_lexicon_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (!file.exists(lex_path)) {
      out_lex <- tryCatch({
        fect(
          antisem_rate_lexicon ~ treated,
          data = as.data.frame(panel),
          index = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
          method = "ife",
          force = "two-way",
          se = TRUE, vartype = "bootstrap", nboots = 200,
          parallel = TRUE, cores = cores_per, seed = seed_val
        )
      }, error = function(e) NULL)
      if (!is.null(out_lex)) {
        saveRDS(out_lex, lex_path)
        results <- c(results, paste0("  lexicon: ATT=", round(out_lex$att.avg, 4)))
      } else {
        results <- c(results, "  lexicon: FAILED")
      }
      rm(out_lex); gc()
    } else {
      results <- c(results, "  lexicon: exists")
    }

    rm(panel); gc()
    writeLines(paste0("ALL DONE ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
    paste0(fig_key, ":\n", paste(results, collapse = "\n"))
  }

  if (N_WORKERS <= 1) {
    # Sequential fallback
    for (fig_key in todo_figs) {
      msg <- fit_all_fect(fig_key, FIGURES, MODELS_DIR, DATA_PANELS,
                          CORES_PER, SEED)
      message(msg)
    }
  } else {
    cl <- makeCluster(N_WORKERS)
    on.exit(stopCluster(cl), add = TRUE)

    results <- parLapplyLB(cl, todo_figs, fit_all_fect,
                           figures_list = FIGURES,
                           models_dir = MODELS_DIR,
                           panels_dir = DATA_PANELS,
                           cores_per = CORES_PER,
                           seed_val = SEED)

    stopCluster(cl)
    on.exit(NULL)

    message("\n=== fect results ===")
    for (r in results) message(r, "\n")
  }
}

message("\n\nAll fect antisemitism models complete.")
```

## Modern DiD estimators (CS, SA, dCDH, TWFE)

```{r modern-did}
did_methods <- c("cs_notyet", "iw", "didm", "twfe")
did_labels  <- c(cs_notyet = "Callaway & Sant'Anna",
                 iw        = "Sun & Abraham",
                 didm      = "de Chaisemartin & D'Haultfoeuille",
                 twfe      = "Dynamic TWFE")

# Determine which figures need modern DiD work
todo_figs_did <- names(FIGURES)[sapply(names(FIGURES), function(fk) {
  panel_path <- file.path(DATA_PANELS, paste0("did_panel_antisem_", fk, ".parquet"))
  if (!file.exists(panel_path)) return(FALSE)
  paths <- paste0(file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("did_", did_methods, "_antisem_", fk, ".rds")))
  !all(file.exists(paths))
})]

n_todo_did <- length(todo_figs_did)
message("Figures needing modern DiD: ", n_todo_did, " of ", length(FIGURES))

if (n_todo_did == 0) {
  message("All modern DiD models already exist.")
} else {
  # Modern DiD is faster than fect (no bootstrap) — use more figure-workers
  N_WORKERS_DID <- min(n_todo_did, max(1, total_cores - 1))
  message("Launching ", N_WORKERS_DID, " workers for ", n_todo_did, " figures")

  prog_dir_did <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, ".progress_did")
  dir.create(prog_dir_did, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  fit_all_modern_did <- function(fig_key, figures_list, models_dir, panels_dir,
                                  wrapper_path, did_methods_vec) {
    library(arrow)
    library(data.table)
    source(wrapper_path)

    prog_file <- file.path(models_dir, ".progress_did", paste0(fig_key, ".txt"))
    writeLines(paste0("STARTED ", Sys.time()), prog_file)

    fig <- figures_list[[fig_key]]
    panel_path <- file.path(panels_dir, paste0("did_panel_antisem_", fig_key, ".parquet"))
    panel <- as.data.table(read_parquet(panel_path))

    results <- character(0)
    for (method in did_methods_vec) {
      model_path <- file.path(models_dir,
                              paste0("did_", method, "_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
      if (file.exists(model_path)) {
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": exists"))
        next
      }

      out <- tryCatch({
        extra_args <- list(
          data   = as.data.frame(panel),
          Y      = "antisem_rate_roberta",
          D      = "treated",
          index  = c("newspaper_id", "time_id"),
          method = method
        )
        if (method == "didm") {
          extra_args$didm.effects <- 6
          extra_args$didm.placebo <- 3
        }
        do.call(did_wrapper, extra_args)
      }, error = function(e) NULL)

      if (!is.null(out)) {
        saveRDS(out, model_path)
        avg <- out$est.avg
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": ATT=", round(avg$ATT.avg, 4),
                                     " SE=", round(avg$S.E., 4)))
      } else {
        results <- c(results, paste0("  ", method, ": FAILED"))
      }
      rm(out); gc()
    }

    rm(panel); gc()
    writeLines(paste0("ALL DONE ", Sys.time()), prog_file)
    paste0(fig_key, ":\n", paste(results, collapse = "\n"))
  }

  wrapper_path <- file.path(PROJECT_ROOT, "R", "did_wrapper.R")

  if (N_WORKERS_DID <= 1) {
    for (fig_key in todo_figs_did) {
      msg <- fit_all_modern_did(fig_key, FIGURES, MODELS_DIR, DATA_PANELS,
                                 wrapper_path, did_methods)
      message(msg)
    }
  } else {
    cl <- makeCluster(N_WORKERS_DID)
    on.exit(stopCluster(cl), add = TRUE)

    results <- parLapplyLB(cl, todo_figs_did, fit_all_modern_did,
                           figures_list = FIGURES,
                           models_dir = MODELS_DIR,
                           panels_dir = DATA_PANELS,
                           wrapper_path = wrapper_path,
                           did_methods_vec = did_methods)

    stopCluster(cl)
    on.exit(NULL)

    message("\n=== Modern DiD results ===")
    for (r in results) message(r, "\n")
  }
}

message("\n\nAll modern DiD antisemitism models complete.")
```

## Results summary

```{r results-summary}
extract_att <- function(model, label) {
  att <- as.numeric(model$att.avg)
  se <- if (!is.null(model$att.avg.boot) && length(model$att.avg.boot) > 1) {
    sd(model$att.avg.boot)
  } else NA_real_
  data.table(
    Model = label, ATT = round(att, 4), SE = round(se, 4),
    CI_lower = round(att - 1.96 * se, 4), CI_upper = round(att + 1.96 * se, 4),
    p_value = round(2 * pnorm(-abs(att / se)), 4)
  )
}

extract_did_att <- function(model, label) {
  avg <- model$est.avg
  data.table(
    Model = label,
    ATT = round(avg$ATT.avg, 4), SE = round(avg$S.E., 4),
    CI_lower = round(avg$CI.lower, 4), CI_upper = round(avg$CI.upper, 4),
    p_value = round(avg$p.value, 4)
  )
}

for (fig_key in names(FIGURES)) {
  fig <- FIGURES[[fig_key]]
  message("\n--- ", fig$name, " (Antisemitism) ---")

  results_list <- list()

  # fect models
  for (method in c("ife", "mc", "fe")) {
    mp <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("fect_", method, "_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (file.exists(mp)) {
      m <- readRDS(mp)
      label <- switch(method, ife="IFE", mc="Matrix Completion", fe="Two-Way FE")
      results_list[[paste0("fect_", method)]] <- extract_att(m, label)
      rm(m); gc()
    }
  }

  # Modern DiD
  for (method in did_methods) {
    mp <- file.path(MODELS_DIR, paste0("did_", method, "_antisem_", fig_key, ".rds"))
    if (file.exists(mp)) {
      m <- readRDS(mp)
      results_list[[paste0("did_", method)]] <- extract_did_att(m, did_labels[method])
      rm(m); gc()
    }
  }

  if (length(results_list) > 0) {
    results <- rbindlist(results_list)
    print(results)
  } else {
    message("  No models found.")
  }
}
```
